summary: P2 Authorization Context Testing - Backend APIs all working correctly (19/19 tests passed). Frontend location modal appears but has Select dropdown interaction issue inside Dialog.

ui_bugs.issue: Select dropdown inside Dialog modal doesn't open properly - click events not being registered due to Radix UI Dialog/Select interaction conflict

integration_issues.issue: Countries API returns 200 with 7 countries, but Select dropdown doesn't render options due to Dialog overlay interaction

backend_api_tests.list_pods: PASS - Returns pods list (1 pod: Alpha Team)
backend_api_tests.scope_has_filter_attributes: PASS - Scopes have countries, regions, market_segments, service_types fields
backend_api_tests.ip_info_endpoint: PASS - Returns IP and location info
backend_api_tests.super_admin_full_access_flow: PASS - Super admin can access all operators
backend_api_tests.admin_access_flow: PASS - Admin access flow works with authorization context

frontend_tests.location_modal_appears: PASS - Location modal appears for customers on first visit
frontend_tests.location_modal_elements: PASS - Modal has title, description, dropdown, Skip and Confirm buttons

frontend_tests.select_dropdown_interaction: FAIL - Select dropdown doesn't open due to Dialog/Select interaction conflict

action_items: Fix Select dropdown inside Dialog modal - the click event is not being registered properly due to Radix UI Dialog overlay intercepting events
Consider using a different approach for country selection (e.g., native select, or move Select outside Dialog portal)
Alternative: Use modal={false} on Select or implement custom dropdown
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed double /api/ prefix in LocationSelectionModal.jsx - API client already has /api as baseURL
Added onPointerDownOutside and onInteractOutside handlers to prevent Dialog from closing when interacting with Select
Updated Select component z-index from z-50 to z-[100] to render above Dialog overlay
The Select dropdown inside Dialog is a known Radix UI issue - the Dialog's focus trap and overlay can interfere with Select portal rendering

success_rate.frontend: 83% (5/6 tests passed - Select dropdown interaction failing)

seed_data_creation: 7 countries in geography, 7 employee scopes, 1 pod (Alpha Team), 6+ operators
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend authorization context is fully functional. Operator listing API returns access_info with has_global_access, pod_name, scope_count. Super admin sees all operators. The frontend LocationSelectionModal has a UI bug where the Select dropdown doesn't open properly inside the Dialog modal due to Radix UI interaction conflict. The countries API is working (returns 7 countries) but the dropdown options don't render. Main agent needs to fix the Select/Dialog interaction issue.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Select dropdown inside Dialog modal doesn't open
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Radix UI Dialog and Select components have a known interaction conflict. The Dialog's overlay and focus trap interfere with the Select portal rendering. When clicking the SelectTrigger, the aria-expanded remains false, indicating the click event is not being properly handled.
reproduction_steps: 2. Wait for location modal to appear (after 2 seconds)
4. Observe that dropdown doesn't open (aria-expanded stays false)
attempted_fixes: Added z-[100] to SelectContent to render above Dialog overlay
Added onPointerDownOutside and onInteractOutside handlers to prevent Dialog from closing
Used force=True in Playwright clicks to bypass overlay
rca_of_the_issue.recommended_solution: Replace shadcn Select with a native HTML select element inside the Dialog, or use a custom dropdown implementation that doesn't rely on Radix UI portal
